label: Thing def count range
description: Associates a ThingDef with an IntRange count. Used in object-shaped contexts where each entry has explicit thingDef and countRange fields rather than the named-map shorthand.

thingDef.label: Thing def
thingDef.description: ThingDef this count range applies to.

countRange.label: Count range
countRange.description: IntRange specifying the minimum and maximum count for this ThingDef.
